IPM.Tab.Title: Players
IPM.Tab.Subtitle: Inspiration is available at all times, not only in combat.
IPM.Tab.Empty: No player characters are available to track inspiration.
IPM.Counter.Label: Inspiration
IPM.Button.CriticalHint: Reroll the latest d20 roll and turn it into a critical
IPM.Notification.NoPermission: You cannot change inspiration for that actor.
IPM.Notification.NoRoll: No recent roll was found for {actor}.
IPM.Notification.NoD20: The latest roll for {actor} has no d20, so it cannot become a critical.
IPM.Notification.CriticalSpent: {actor} spends 2 inspiration and turns the reroll into a critical.
IPM.Notification.Failed: The inspiration action could not be completed.
IPM.Chat.CriticalFlavor: {actor} spends 2 inspiration and forces a critical
